task.title: Consolidate configuration in {config_module}

# subscription Configuration

[database]

port = 5432

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
subscription_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
